chosen_action.title: AI Coding Tool Comparison: Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, and the Workflow Layer Most Teams Actually Need

shared_findings_used: market_intelligence_latest.json: reusable competitor set and comparison-page artifacts for Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, Continue, Copilot, and others
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: flat Codeberg adoption plus execution_ceiling_repetition requires a fresh non-monitor asset in this run
MARKETING_SELF_IMPROVEMENT.md: the HN/Lobsters ceiling must be replaced with a new distribution lane, not repeated
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: trust and free-use improve when messaging clarifies the category and first-fit use case
curator_outreach_targets.md: curated-list and comparison-page outreach is the strongest non-HN lane currently available
why_this_action.reasoning: The highest-leverage move available right now was a curator-friendly comparison asset that reuses shared competitor findings, gives comparison pages a clear Ralph Workflow slot, and drives readers to Codeberg first instead of repeating Reddit or HN/Lobsters stall patterns.

expected_outcome.primary_metric: qualified Codeberg visits from comparison-oriented evaluators
expected_outcome.secondary_metric: reusable proof asset for curator outreach and future backlinks
expected_outcome.kill_condition: If comparison-led distribution produces no backlink or Codeberg movement, replace it with a different autonomous lane instead of rewriting the same packet again.

repairs_applied.change: Prevent duplicate same-draft Telegraph republishes after light body edits by deduping on draft name as well as content hash.
Updated proof link to point at the new live comparison asset.
